untranslatable_reason: Diamond Top pattern detection requires visual shape recognition (trend line bounces, diamond geometry, specific touch counts) and dome-shaped volume analysis which cannot be expressed with available point-in-time indicators. The pattern's core identification logic (boundary touches, diamond formation geometry) is not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price trend (rising into pattern via MA position) and volume recession proxy (vol_ratio_20 < 1.0 indicating receding volume). Exit uses MA crossover as reversal signal. However, the core diamond shape formation with adequate boundary touches and dome-shaped volume cannot be reliably coded without custom pattern recognition. Recommend implementing custom pattern detector for this signal.
